name: LEGO City - No Limits
overview: Just Jason here. Is it just me or is the opening track for the new LEGO City No Limits show ABSOLUTE FIRE or what?. Me and my crew - car wizard MechMax , techgenius Bytz and nature-lover Wanda promise you a world of endless fun and action.

trailers.title: LEGO City – No Limits [Official Music Video]
